nodes.label: Ariadne Common Language - Open Issues Before Phase 2
Gemini Agent Critical Analysis of plan_docs
Portal knowledge separated from execution backends
Prevent the first implemented backend from shaping the common language
Define contracts before code moves to reduce coupling relocation
Classify every asset before moving it to avoid migration drift
Keep vision and OS native as separate look versus act concerns
Keep motor-specific contracts local to each motor instead of one giant shared folder
Treat BrowserOS CLI plus current apply and scrape integration as the mandatory slice
Avoid building the full framework before proving the narrow path works end to end
The search for a perfect universal abstraction can delay delivery and create over-engineering risk
Detailed planning docs risk becoming stale if not converted into code quickly
No runtime move should begin until glossary and asset placement documents exist
